decisions.title: Prioritize Meridian OT segmentation — escalate to vendor
decisions.context: Risk-001 (no OT segmentation) flagged critical. Fortinet preferred vendor identified.
decisions.decision: Approved immediate vendor engagement for micro-segmentation assessment. Target close: March 19.

decisions.title: Assign Meridian engagement to Sofia Mendes
decisions.context: Pipeline deal pipe-001 needed a named owner with bandwidth.
decisions.decision: Sofia assigned as primary engagement owner for Meridian Energy. Workload accepted.
decisions.outcomeNotes: Sofia onboarded Meridian. First delivery milestone hit March 6.

decisions.title: Expand NERC CIP-014 monitoring — energy sector focus
decisions.context: Signal sig-001 (CIP-014 amendment) indicated expanding compliance surface in sub-200MW facilities.
decisions.decision: Directed Helena to increase regulatory scan frequency on energy sector. Added to signal classification priority.
decisions.outcomeNotes: Helena updated scanner parameters. 2 additional relevant signals surfaced within 48 hours.

decisions.title: Remove all staff skill limitations — learning policy open
decisions.context: Organizational growth requires agents capable of expanding beyond primary role. Restricting cross-training limits compound intelligence.
decisions.decision: All staff access levels upgraded. Learning policy set to unrestricted. Cross-department collaboration authorized without approval gates.
decisions.outcomeNotes: HR profiles updated. Ava notified staff via email and Teams.
